_note: Pre-reviewed golden for the Denmark 9mg + flavour cap, served when DEMO_MODE=offline or no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. The presenter says 'offline mode' out loud. Status is IN FORCE (full effect Apr 2026). Line items run through the same citation rail as a live call; the last two are deliberate abstentions (DK pouch revenue + XQS DK share are not published).
narrative: Denmark's 9 mg/pouch cap and tobacco/menthol-only flavour rule are in force, with full effect from April 2026 (sik.dk), delisting XQS's flavour-led, higher-strength SKUs in STG's home market. As a restriction rather than a ban, some volume recaptures into compliant ≤9 mg tobacco/menthol SKUs (XQS has hedged into mint), so the recapture rate is the main driver of the band. The direct EBITDA hit is small — pouches are ~5% of group (NGP DKK 428m FY2025) and Denmark is a small market (DKK 222m of group net sales across all products) — but it constrains the DKK 1bn+ pouch growth ambition. Denmark's pouch revenue is not published by STG, so it is an editable assumption here, not STG's own figure.

lineItems.claim: STG pouch base — NGP net sales (FY2025)

lineItems.reason: not published by STG — set via the editable 'Denmark share', never presented as STG's own figure
